theme: courier routes through a city with secret districts
title: Secret Districts: Maximum-Reach Courier Routes
strategies: trivial baseline: spam the intra-district shuffle (move 1) at increasing lengths -- stays inside the seed district
greedy: sample many random routes, keep the k that add the most new addresses -- random routes concentrate in a few districts near the seed and churn within them

strong: recover the hidden district partition via the pair-orbit closure (imprimitivity block recovery), find the inter-district move as the generator with non-trivial district-action, BFS a short route per distinct district (transversal), then fill reached districts with leftover budget
insight: coverage grows by a district-size factor per route once you permute whole districts transversally instead of adding addresses one at a time
